howItWorks.intro: This dollar cost average calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Total Invested = Monthly Amount × Number of Months
Average Price = Total Invested ÷ Total Coins Purchased
DCA Value = Total Coins × End Price
DCA Return = (Final Value - Total Invested) ÷ Total Invested × 100%
howItWorks.outro: Cryptocurrency markets are highly volatile. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

faq.question: What is dollar-cost averaging (DCA)?
faq.answer: DCA means investing a fixed amount at regular intervals regardless of price. You buy more when prices are low and less when high, which can lower your average purchase price in volatile markets.

faq.question: Is DCA better than lump-sum investing?
faq.answer: Historically, lump-sum beats DCA about 2/3 of the time in rising markets. However, DCA reduces risk of bad timing and is psychologically easier. In volatile or declining markets, DCA often wins.

faq.question: How often should I DCA?
faq.answer: Weekly or monthly are most common. More frequent DCA (weekly) provides slightly better averaging but the difference is small. Choose whatever schedule you can stick to consistently.

faq.question: Is the Dollar Cost Average Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard cryptocurrency and blockchain formulas trusted by crypto investors and traders. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Dollar Cost Average Calculator?
sections.body: The Dollar Cost Average Calculator is a free online tool designed for crypto investors and traders who need quick, accurate calculations in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space. By entering your monthly investment, number of months, starting price, you get instant results including total invested, average purchase price, dca final value. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting total invested right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In cryptocurrency and blockchain, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by crypto investors and traders worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to evaluate your crypto portfolio with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your monthly investment and need to find the right total invested. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
